name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV400 protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Polarized lenses reduce glare and eye strain. Lightweight frame fits all face shapes. Includes a protective case and cleaning cloth.

name: Tropical Beach Shirt
description: Vibrant tropical print beach shirt made from 100% breathable cotton. Features a relaxed fit with a button-down front and chest pocket. Perfect for beach days, pool parties, or casual summer outings.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant formula lasts up to 80 minutes. Non-greasy, lightweight texture absorbs quickly into skin without leaving a white cast.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Giant flamingo-shaped inflatable pool float that can hold up to 200 lbs. Made from premium PVC material that resists punctures. Includes a repair patch kit and storage bag. Great for pools, lakes, and calm beaches.

name: Summer Straw Hat
description: Wide-brim natural straw hat with UPF 50+ protection. Adjustable inner band ensures a perfect fit. The foldable design makes it easy to pack for travel. Stylish and functional for beach, garden, or outdoor festivals.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing aloe vera gel enriched with vitamin E and cucumber extract. Instantly cools and hydrates sun-exposed skin. Reduces redness and peeling after sun exposure. 99% natural ingredients, paraben-free and cruelty-free.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Large waterproof tote bag perfect for beach days. Features multiple compartments including an insulated cooler pocket for drinks and snacks. Sand-resistant fabric wipes clean easily. Includes a wet bag for swimwear.

name: Coconut Lip Balm SPF 30
description: Moisturizing lip balm with SPF 30 protection and a tropical coconut scent. Enriched with shea butter and vitamin E to keep lips soft and hydrated. Long-lasting formula that stays on through swimming and outdoor activities.
